𝗧𝗧𝗬𝗗 | Enabling remote access and sharing of terminal sessions through a web browser.  🔥 Super Hot!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 C 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling remote access and sharing of terminal sessions through a web browser.
📅 Created: Sep 2016 • Updated: Mar 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Share terminal over the web using WebSockets
✅ Built on libuv and WebGL2 for performance
✅ Full terminal features including CJK and IME support
✅ ZMODEM/trzsz file transfer support
✅ Sixel image output support
✅ SSL support via OpenSSL/Mbed TLS
✅ Basic authentication and custom command execution
✅ Cross-platform compatibility (macOS, Linux, FreeBSD, OpenWrt, Windows)


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 61 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ttyd is a command-line utility that allows users to share their terminal sessions over the web via WebSockets. It provides a fully-featured terminal experience in a browser, supporting features like file transfer and image output, and can be run on various operating systems.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/tsl0922/ttyd

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!
👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆


🏷️ 𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗦
#openwrt #ssl #terminal #terminal_emulators #tty

𝗪𝗔𝗔𝗦 | To provide an accessible and scalable service for transcribing audio and video content, with both a user-friendly interface and a robust API for integration.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an accessible and scalable service for transcribing audio and video content, with both a user-friendly interface and a robust API for integration.
📅 Created: Oct 2022 • Updated: Mar 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ GUI for uploading and transcribing audio/video
✅ API for asynchronous transcription jobs
✅ Queuing system for transcription processing
✅ Email notifications with download links for transcriptions
✅ Local browser-based editor for correcting transcriptions
✅ Support for multiple output formats (JSON, SRT, TXT, VTT)
✅ Language detection endpoint
✅ Webhook support for job status updates


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 116 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 18 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Whisper as a Service (WAAS) provides a GUI and API for transcribing audio and video files using OpenAI Whisper. It offers asynchronous job processing, language detection, and various output formats for transcriptions, with an integrated editor for local transcription correction.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/schibsted/WAAS

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗢𝗡𝗖𝗘 | Simplifying the process of self-hosting and managing Dockerized web applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Simplifying the process of self-hosting and managing Dockerized web applications.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Easy installation of Docker-based web apps
✅ Automatic updates
✅ Automatic backups
✅ System information dashboard
✅ TUI and CLI interfaces
✅ Support for various hardware (servers, Raspberry Pi, laptops)
✅ Ability to install built-in 37signals apps or any compatible Docker image


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 59 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ONCE is a platform designed to simplify the self-hosting of Docker-based web applications. It provides an easy-to-use interface for installation, automatic updates, backups, and system monitoring, catering to both TUI and CLI users.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/basecamp/once

𝗣𝗔𝗣𝗘𝗥𝟮𝗔𝗟𝗟 | To automatically generate interactive academic homepages from research papers.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automatically generate interactive academic homepages from research papers.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Autonomous pipeline for converting scientific papers to homepages
✅ Iterative refinement of content and layout
✅ Creation of engaging and interactive websites
✅ Addresses limitations of direct generation, templates, and HTML conversion
✅ Includes a dataset and benchmark for evaluation and improvement


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 356 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 31 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Paper2Web is an autonomous pipeline that transforms academic papers into interactive, explorable homepages. It refines both content and layout to create engaging websites that effectively disseminate research, addressing limitations of current conversion methods.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/YuhangChen1/Paper2All

𝗔𝗥𝗚𝗢𝗦-𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗦𝗟𝗔𝗧𝗘 | Providing an offline, programmatic translation service through a Python library and command-line tools, with support for installing various language models.  🔥 Super Hot!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing an offline, programmatic translation service through a Python library and command-line tools, with support for installing various language models.
📅 Created: Apr 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Offline translation
✅ Python library
✅ Command-line interface
✅ GUI application
✅ Installable language model packages (.argosmodel)
✅ Automatic language pivoting
✅ OpenNMT backend
✅ LibreTranslate integration


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 435 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 146 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Argos Translate is an open-source, offline translation library written in Python. It leverages OpenNMT for its translation engine and supports installation of language model packages. It also features automatic pivoting through intermediate languages for unsupported direct translations, and is the engine behind LibreTranslate.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/argosopentech/argos-translate

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗡𝗘𝗫𝗧-𝗔𝗜-𝗗𝗥𝗔𝗪-𝗜𝗢 | To enable users to create, modify, and visualize diagrams quickly and intuitively using AI and natural language, streamlining the process of technical diagramming.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable users to create, modify, and visualize diagrams quickly and intuitively using AI and natural language, streamlining the process of technical diagramming.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered diagram generation from natural language prompts
✅ Integration with draw.io for editing and visualization
✅ Support for various cloud provider icons (AWS, GCP, Azure)
✅ Live demo available online
✅ Desktop application and Docker support
✅ Multi-provider support for AI models


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 25K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.6K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 113 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Next AI Draw.io is a Next.js web application that leverages AI to enhance diagram creation and modification. It allows users to generate and edit diagrams using natural language commands, integrating with the draw.io editor for a seamless workflow.
